name: shiny-text

docs:
# Shiny Text
A glossy text treatment with a subtle moving highlight.
## Import
```tsx
import { ShinyText } from "@/components/ui/shiny-text";
```
## Usage
```tsx
<ShinyText shimmerWidth={100} words={undefined} typingSpeed={undefined}>Shiny text that catches the light</ShinyText>
```
## Props
- **label** (string) — default: `"Shiny text that catches the light"`: Text
- **shimmerWidth** (number) — default: `100`: Shimmer width
- **words** (string): Words
- **typingSpeed** (number): Typing speed
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add shiny-text
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/shiny-text
```
